Research

  1. The Art of Gift-Giving with Limited Preference Data: How Fashion Recommender Systems Can Help
    S. Alipour, S. Elahimanesh, A. Ghayouri Sales, Iman Mohammadi, P. Morassafar, S. P. Neshaei
    ACM CHI (Late-Breaking Work), 2024
  2. User Voices, Platform Choices: Social Media Policy Puzzle with Decentralization Salt
    S. Elahimanesh, Iman Mohammadi, M. Mosayyebi, S. Zahedi Movahed, H. Hasani, M. Rohban
    ACM CHI (Late-Breaking Work), 2024
  3. Improving Grading Fairness and Transparency with Decentralized Collaborative Peer Assessment
    S. Alipour, S. Elahimanesh, S. Jahanzad, Iman Mohammadi, P. Morassafar, S. P. Neshaei
    ACM CSCW, 2024
  4. LLMs in HCI Data Work: Bridging the Gap Between Information Retrieval and Responsible Research Practices

    CHI 2024 Workshop on LLMs as Research Tools, 2024
